title: [InstCombine] fold unsigned predicates on srem result

tests.outside_scope_reason: Tests exact boundary condition (C == abs(DivisorC)-1) with i16 type; summary says 'at least' but doesn't demonstrate the minimum threshold case

alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define i1 @test_ugt_i16_srem4_exact_boundary(i16 %x) {
  %1 = and i16 %x, -32765
  %c = icmp ugt i16 %1, -32768
  ret i1 %c
}
